readMacSendData() - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHFProtocolParseAx
 
readMacSendData() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.UHFProtocolParseAxFromJava
 
readTagFromBuffer() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.ble.RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx
 
readTagFromBuffer() - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
接收循环盘点的标签数据
Receive label data for cycle count
创建一个子线程调用此方法获取标签数据，此方法非阻塞模式。此方法只负责从数据缓冲区获取标签数据，如果数据缓冲区没有标签数据，将返回NULL。
Create a child thread to call this method to get tag data, this method is non-blocking mode.
readTagFromBuffer() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.serialport.SPUR4Linux
 
readTagFromBuffer() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinux
 
readTagFromBuffer() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinuxDeviceAPI
获取缓冲区的标签数据
Get tag data from buffer
UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.startInventoryTag()启动识别标签之后，在子线程循环调用此函数不断获取缓冲区的标签信息，每次返回一张标签数据
UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.startInventoryTag() After tag reading has been enabled, call this function in sub threads to get data information continously, return one tag information for each time.
在调用UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.stopInventory()之后，应当退出子线程。
After call UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.stopInventory(), exit sub threads.
readTagFromBuffer() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4
Deprecated.

Create a child thread to call this method to get tag data, this method is non-blocking mode.

Create a child thread to call this method to get tag data, this method is non-blocking mode.

RFIDWithUHFBase - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi
 
RFIDWithUHFBase() - Constructor for class com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFBase
 
RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi.ble
 
RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4 - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi
操作URA4设备以及UHF模块相关接口。
Operate URA4 devices and related interfaces of UHF modules.
操作步骤：
Steps:
第一步：连接通过 RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4.init(String host, int port)连接读写器。同时可以设置回调接口 RFIDWithUHFNetworkAx.setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)监听连接状态。
Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4.init(String host, int port).
RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4() - Constructor for class com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4
 
RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8 - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi
A8模块串口通信操作类
Operate URA8 devices and related interfaces of UHF modules.
操作步骤：
Steps:
第一步：连接通过 RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8.init(String com)连接读写器串口。同时可以设置回调接口 RFIDWithUHFNetworkAx.setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)监听连接状态。
Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8.init(String com).
RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8() - Constructor for class com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8
 
RFIDWithUHFNetworkAccessGate - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi
通道门操作接口(access gate operation interface)。
操作步骤：
Steps:
第一步：连接通过 RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4.init(String host, int port)连接读写器。同时可以设置回调接口 RFIDWithUHFNetworkAx.setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)监听连接状态。
通过RFIDWithUHFNetworkAccessGate.setOnAccessGateChangeListener(IAccessGateState iAccessGateState)监听通道门进出状态
Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4.init(String host, int port).
RFIDWithUHFNetworkAccessGate() - Constructor for class com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFNetworkAccessGate
 
RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4 - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi
UHF模块UR4网口通信操作类
UR4 network operation of UHF module
操作步骤：
Steps:
第一步：连接通过 RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4.init(String host, int port)连接读写器串口。同时可以设置回调接口 RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4.setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)监听连接状态。
Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4.init(String host, int port).
RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4() - Constructor for class com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4

Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via RFIDWithUHFSerialPortA4.init(String com).

通过RFIDWithUHFSerialPortAccessGate.setOnAccessGateChangeListener(IAccessGateState iAccessGateState)监听通道门进出状态

RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4 - Class in com.rscja.deviceapi
UHF模块UR4串口通信操作类
UHF module UR4 serial communication operation class
操作URA4设备以及UHF模块相关接口
Operate URA4 devices and related interfaces of UHF modules.

操作步骤：
Steps:
第一步：连接通过 RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4.init(String com)连接读写器串口。同时可以设置回调接口 RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4.setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)监听连接状态。
Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4.init(String com).
